query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts) as total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus = 'verified') as verified,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus = 'ai_suggested') as ai_suggested,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus IS NULL OR verificationStatus = 'unverified') as unverified,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE linkedinProfileUrl IS NOT NULL AND linkedinProfileUrl != '') as with_linkedin,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != '') as with_email,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT projectId) FROM contacts) as projects_with_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as total_projects
